mission.title: grpc: [Python][macOS] 3.10 wheel is mislabeled as universal2
mission.description: [Python][macOS] 3.10 wheel is mislabeled as universal2. This issue affects 50+ users.

steps.title: Identify grpc troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your grpc setup:
gRPC library — check your language-specific package (e.g., pip show grpcio, npm ls @grpc/grpc-js)
Check your build output and test logs for errors related to this issue.

steps.title: Review grpc configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant grpc configuration:
```
(venv) grigoryvorobiev pythonProject1 % python main.py                    
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/Users/grigoryvorobiev/PycharmProjects/pythonProject1/main.py", line 1, in <module>
    from google.cloud import translate

steps.title: Apply the fix for [Python][macOS] 3.10 wheel is mislabeled as universal2
steps.description:
This is an issue for 3.10 users.
```yaml
(venv) grigoryvorobiev@MacBook-Pro-Grigory pythonProject1 % python main.py

    from google.cloud.translate_v3.services.translation_service.client import (

```

steps.title: Confirm [Python][macOS] 3.10 wheel is mislabeled as… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test grpc to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary: See the fix PR for the community-verified solution: https://github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/28714
codeSnippets:
(venv) grigoryvorobiev@MacBook-Pro-Grigory pythonProject1 % python main.py                    
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/Users/grigoryvorobiev/PycharmProjects/pythonProject1/main.py", line 1, in <module>
    from google.cloud import translate
  File "/Users/grigoryvorobiev/PycharmProjects/pythonProject1/venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/google/cloud/translate/__init__.py", line 17, in <module>

prerequisites.description: gRPC library — check your language-specific package (e.g., pip show grpcio, npm ls @grpc/grpc-js)
